text:
Author: danilo
Date: Tue Dec 17 17:51:02 2013
New Revision: 336746
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/336746

Log:
  - Update from 2.10 to 2.10.1 [1]
  - Add LICENSE
  
  PR:		ports/184929
  Submitted by:	arrowdodger <6yearold@gmail.com> (maintainer) [1]

Modified:
  head/devel/tortoisehg2/Makefile
  head/devel/tortoisehg2/distinfo

Modified: head/devel/tortoisehg2/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/devel/tortoisehg2/Makefile	Tue Dec 17 17:50:17 2013	(r336745)
+++ head/devel/tortoisehg2/Makefile	Tue Dec 17 17:51:02 2013	(r336746)
@@ -1,13 +1,15 @@
 # $FreeBSD$
 
 PORTNAME=	tortoisehg
-PORTVERSION=	2.10
+PORTVERSION=	2.10.1
 CATEGORIES=	devel
 MASTER_SITES=	http://cdn.bitbucket.org/tortoisehg/targz/downloads/
 
 MAINTAINER=	6yearold@gmail.com
 COMMENT=	THg script from TortoiseHG
 
+LICENSE=	GPLv2
+
 BUILD_DEPENDS=	${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}qt4-core>=4.10.2:${PORTSDIR}/devel/py-qt4-core \
 		${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}qt4-qscintilla2>=2.7.2:${PORTSDIR}/devel/py-qt4-qscintilla2 \
 		${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}qt4-network>=4.10.2:${PORTSDIR}/net/py-qt4-network \
